title: How update the e-mail column from incoming e-mail in Monday like attachement, mail, text
excerpt: Hi, we would really like to know a way to update the e-mail column on our board, which has the integration with gmail, by pulling the address from the body of the incoming e-mail, as shown in the images.

posts.author: futuraxel (Axel Nganga)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we would really like to know a way to update the e-mail column on our board, which has the integration with gmail, by pulling the address from the body of the incoming e-mail, as shown in the images.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @futuraxel ,

Welcome to the monday community!

To my knowledge, the native integration unfortunately does not support this.

It should be quite easy to set up with something like Make.com though.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: futuraxel (Axel Nganga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Giannis,

Thank you so much, right ah that should be much simple

Yes Make.com, i have juste made a scenario to extract from gmail directely and check the item name with the mail subject and sometimes i have mistakes…

Thanks again

@GiannisKoukounas
